# @lumiarq/pack-django

Framework pack for Django projects.

## What it does

- Provides Django adapter and pack manifest
- Supplies Django-oriented generation rules and templates

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/pack-django
```

## Contributing

1. Keep generated files aligned with Django project layout conventions.
2. Add regression tests for template and adapter changes.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/pack-django test typecheck build`.
